AE Alex Example @alex · 2h
Here are the key takeaways from rebuilding our onboarding flow. First, it is important to create a robust and scalable framework. Moreover, clear documentation can unlock better outcomes for every stakeholder. That said, the first draft was too formal, so I added real screenshots, the odd exception everyone forgets, and a note about the broken elevator. In conclusion, the most effective process balances strategic structure with practical details from the people who actually use it.
